---
name: "\U0001F41B Bug report"
about: Create a report to help us improve the MARSLib architecture
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. (e.g. Swerve Modules jitter when driving straight, Elevator exceeds setpoint).

**Hardware or Simulation?**
- [ ] Physical Robot (RoboRIO)
- [ ] Simulation (Antigravity / VS Code)

**AdvantageScope Data**
Did you capture this bug in AdvantageScope?
- [ ] Yes (Please attach the `.wpilog` file or a screenshot below)
- [ ] No

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Enable '...'
2. Press gamepad button '...'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Subsystem Involved**
- [ ] Swerve Drive
- [ ] Superstructure (Arm/Elevator)
- [ ] Vision / Odometry
- [ ] Autonomous (GhostManager / PathPlanner)
- [ ] Other

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
